STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-GEAR_OF_AMBITION.d:
No effect.
[gold]Fuse[/gold]: Exhaust another [gold]Gear of Ambition[/gold] to create a [gold]Striker Artifact[/gold].
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-GEAR_OF_REMEMBRANC:
No effect.
[gold]Fuse[/gold]: Exhaust another [gold]Gear of Remembrance[/gold] to create a [gold]Fortifier Artifact[/gold].
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-STRIKER_ARTIFACT.d:
Deal {Damage:diff} damage.
[gold]Fuse[/gold]: Exhaust [gold]Artifacts[/gold] to transform based on total cost of cards fused.
1: [gold]Ominous Artifact α[/gold]
2: [gold]Ominous Artifact β[/gold]
3 or more: [gold]Ominous Artifact γ[/gold]
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-FORTIFIER_ARTIFACT:
Gain {Block:diff} Block.
[gold]Fuse[/gold]: Exhaust [gold]Artifacts[/gold] to transform based on total cost of cards fused.
1: [gold]Ominous Artifact α[/gold]
2: [gold]Ominous Artifact β[/gold]
3 or more: [gold]Ominous Artifact γ[/gold]
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-OMINOUS_ARTIFACT_A:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff} damage. Damage increases by {ExtraDamage:diff} for each card in your exhaust pile. Deal {MagicNumber:diff} damage to ALL other enemies.
[gold]Fuse[/gold]: Exhaust [gold]Ominous Artifact β[/gold] and [gold]Ominous Artifact γ[/gold] to create [gold]Masterwork Artifact Ω[/gold].
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-OMINOUS_ARTIFACT_B:
Heal {Heal:diff} HP. Gain {Block:diff} Block. Gain {PlatingPower:diff} [gold]Plating[/gold].
[gold]Fuse[/gold]: Exhaust [gold]Ominous Artifact α[/gold] and [gold]Ominous Artifact γ[/gold] to create [gold]Masterwork Artifact Ω[/gold].
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-OMINOUS_ARTIFACT_G:
Draw {Cards:diff} cards. Gain {Energy:diff} Energy. Next turn, draw {MagicNumber:diff} additional cards.
[gold]Fuse[/gold]: Exhaust [gold]Ominous Artifact α[/gold] and [gold]Ominous Artifact β[/gold] to create [gold]Masterwork Artifact Ω[/gold].
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-MASTERWORK_OMEGA.d: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff} damage. Damage increases by {ExtraDamage:diff} for each card in your exhaust pile. Deal {MagicNumber:diff} damage to ALL other enemies. Heal {Heal:diff} HP. Gain {Block:diff} Block. Gain {PlatingPower:diff} [gold]Plating[/gold]. Draw {Cards:diff} cards. Gain {Energy:diff} Energy. Next turn, draw {DrawNextTurn:diff} additional cards.
Add a [gold]Gear of Remembrance[/gold] and [gold]Gear of Ambition[/gold] to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-FLIGHT_OF_ICARUS.d: Select an [gold]Artifact[/gold] in your hand. It costs 0 this turn, and you draw a card when you play it.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-ELISE_ELECTRIFYING: Gain {Block:diff} Block. Add a [gold]Gear of Remembrance[/gold] to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-IRONHEART_HUNTER.d: Deal {Damage:diff} damage. Add a [gold]Gear of Ambition[/gold] to your hand.
Add a [gold]Gear of Ambition[/gold] to your hand. Select any [gold]Artifact[/gold] in your hand, and add a copy of it to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-BULLET_FROM_BEYOND: Deal {Damage:diff} damage. Add a [gold]Gear of Ambition[/gold] and [gold]Gear of Remembrance[/gold] to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-DOOMWRIGHT_RESURGE: Select up to 2 [gold]Artifact[/gold] cards in your hand that cost 1 or less. Add a copy of each. The copies cost 0 this turn and have [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-CARNELIA_EMBER_OF_: Add a [gold]Gear of Remembrance[/gold] to your hand. Choose an [gold]Artifact[/gold] in your hand to Exhaust. Gain energy equal to its cost +1.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-MIRIAM_THE_RESOLUT: Add 2 [gold]Gears of Remembrance[/gold] and 2 [gold]Gears of Ambition[/gold] to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-RUKINA_RESISTANCE_: Gain {Block:diff} Block. Add a [gold]Gear of Ambition[/gold] and [gold]Gear of Remembrance[/gold] to your hand. Add a [gold]Striker Artifact[/gold] to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-NEW_AGE_CARTOGRAPH: Add an [gold]Ominous Artifact β[/gold] to your hand. It has [gold]Ethereal[/gold] and costs 0 this turn.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-ALOUETTE_DOOMWRIGH: Add a [gold]Gear of Ambition[/gold] and [gold]Gear of Remembrance[/gold] to your hand. Select an [gold]Artifact[/gold] in your hand. It costs 0 this turn.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-SHODDY_PLAYTHING.d: Draw {Cards:diff} cards. Add a copy of this card to your draw pile.
Deal {Damage:diff} damage. Add a [gold]Gear of Remembrance[/gold] and a [gold]Striker Artifact[/gold] to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-BRILLIANT_INVENTOR: Add an [gold]Ominous Artifact α[/gold] to your hand. It has [gold]Ethereal[/gold] and costs 0 this turn.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-EUDIE_MAIDEN_REBOR: At end of turn, if your hand has fewer than 5 cards, draw 1 additional card next turn. If your hand has more than 6 cards, gain 1 Energy next turn.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-ANCIENT_CANNON.des: Whenever you [gold]Fuse[/gold] an [gold]Artifact[/gold], deal {MagicNumber:diff} damage to a random enemy.
Select up to {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} [gold]Artifacts[/gold] (cost 2 or less) in your hand. Activate their effects.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-CAMISCILLA_UNFEELI: Deal {Damage:diff} damage for each [gold]Artifact[/gold] in your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-LUDICROUS_ORDNANCE: Add {Cards:diff} copies of this card to your hand. Deal {Damage:diff} damage to ALL enemies for each copy in your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-SYLVIA_GARDEN_EXEC: Choose a [gold]Draw Cards[/gold] or [gold]Heal[/gold] card to add to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-PUPPET.title: Puppet
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-DOLL_SLAYER.title: Doll Slayer
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-DOLL_SLAYER.descri: Deal {Damage:diff} damage to ALL enemies. Add a [gold]Vier, Heart Slayer[/gold] to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-PUPPET_CAT.title: Puppet Cat
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-PUPPET_CAT.descrip: Add a [gold]Puppet[/gold] to your hand. It gains +{BonusDamage:diff} damage.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-PUPPET_LANCER.desc: Deal {Damage:diff} damage. Add an [gold]Enhanced Puppet[/gold] to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-LOVESTRUCK_PUPPETE: Deal {Damage:diff} damage. Add {PuppetCount:diff} [gold]Puppet(s)[/gold] to your hand.
Select a [gold]Puppet[/gold] in your hand and transform it into a [gold]Doll Slayer[/gold]. The Doll Slayer inherits its damage.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-PUPPET_SHIELD.desc: Exhaust up to {IfUpgraded:show:4|3} [gold]Puppets[/gold] in your hand. Gain Block equal to their damage for each.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-WIRED_ASSAULT.desc: Deal {Damage:diff} damage. Add 2 [gold]Puppets[/gold] to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-MEDICAL_GRADE_ASSA: Deal {Damage:diff} damage. Add an [gold]Enhanced Puppet[/gold] with [gold]Recast[/gold] 1 to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-RESURRECTION_TUNER: Exhaust 1 card in your hand. Add up to 2 random [gold]Puppets[/gold] from your exhaust pile to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-PUPPET_THEATER.des: At the start of each turn, add {MagicNumber:diff} [gold]Puppet(s)[/gold] to your hand.
Add a [gold]Puppet[/gold] and an [gold]Enhanced Puppet[/gold] to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-ZWEI_SYMPHONIC_HEA: Add a [gold]Victoria[/gold] to your hand. [gold]Victoria[/gold] gains [gold]Recast[/gold] 1.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-NOAH_THREAD_OF_DEA: All [gold]Puppets[/gold] in your hand gain +{MagicNumber:diff} damage.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-SUBSTANDARD_PUPPET: Deal {Damage:diff} damage. Add 2 copies of this card to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-SYNCHRONOUS_HEARTS: Add a [gold]Lloyd[/gold] and a [gold]Victoria[/gold] to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-LLOYD.title: Lloyd
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-VICTORIA.title: Victoria
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-ORCHIS_NEWFOUND_HE: Add a [gold]Lloyd[/gold] to your hand. Add 2 [gold]Enhanced Puppets[/gold] to your hand. Apply [gold]Recast[/gold] 1 to all [gold]Puppets[/gold] in your hand and exhaust pile.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-LIAM_CRAZED_CREATO: Whenever you play a [gold]Puppet[/gold], gain {MagicNumber:diff} Block. For every 4 [gold]Puppets[/gold] played, gain 1 Energy.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-SUPPLICANT_OF_DEST: Select a card in your hand and Exhaust it. Deal {Damage:diff} damage to a random enemy.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-DEVOTEE_OF_DESTRUC: Exhaust all cards in your hand. Gain {Multiplier:diff}X Block and deal {Multiplier:diff}X damage. X = cards exhausted this turn.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-WASTELAND_OF_DESTR: Select a card in your hand and Exhaust it. Draw {Cards:diff} cards. Add an unplayable copy to your hand. If this card is exhausted, draw 1 card.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-CONGREGANT_OF_DEST: Exhaust all cards in your hand. Draw X cards. X = cards exhausted this turn.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-DEVASTATING_SOPRAN: Select a card in your hand and Exhaust it. Add a [gold]White Psalm, New Revelation[/gold] to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-AXIA_HEIR_TO_DESTR: At end of turn, Exhaust all [gold]White Psalm, New Revelation[/gold] and [gold]Black Psalm, New Revelation[/gold] in your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-LISHENNA_MELODY_MA: Add 2 [gold]White Psalm, New Revelation[/gold] to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-BEELZEBUB_SUPREME_: [gold]White Psalm, New Revelation[/gold] gains +2 Block. [gold]Black Psalm, New Revelation[/gold] gains +2 damage.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-WHITE_PSALM_NEW_RE: At end of turn, gain 2 Block, then transform into [gold]Black Psalm, New Revelation[/gold]. If exhausted, immediately gain 2 Block and add a [gold]Black Psalm[/gold] to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-BLACK_PSALM_NEW_RE: At end of turn, deal 2 damage to ALL enemies, then transform into [gold]White Psalm, New Revelation[/gold]. If exhausted, immediately deal 2 AoE damage and add a [gold]White Psalm[/gold] to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-WASTELAND_OF_DESTR: If exhausted, draw 1 card and gain 1 Energy.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-BIOFABRICATION.des: Select an [gold]Artifact[/gold] in your hand. Subtract 1 from its cost. Put 3 copies of it into your draw pile.
